solutions.solution: Statement: Reports show that a good reason for low productivity in India is lack of discipline. Course of action: Military training should be made compulsory for all citizens. (×) Statement: Reports show that the life expectancy of an average Indian is declining continuously. Course of action: Efforts should be made to prevent children from making noises. (×)
Statement: Reports show that the life expectancy of an average Indian is declining continuously. Course of action: Efforts should be made to prevent children from making noises. (×)

The problem of tax evasion has reached an alarming level in recent years. I. The tax rate should be lowered. (×) II. It has been mentioned, by how much the tax rate should be lowered. (×) III. The tax rate should be lowered in such a way that the benefits of non-evasion outweigh the disadvantage of a drop in tax collection. (×) IV. Taxes should be abolished. (×)
